name: bold_forward_gothic_no_referent

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.12 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION] No-referent ゴシック体 is self-contained Bold; serialize canonicalises ゴシック体→太字 (idempotent after pass 1, §6.12). The target is absent from the preceding text (no-referent), so §6.14 degradation no longer applies; serialize reconstructs the bracket byte-exact (§7.6). Bytes from the reference parser.

source: 本文［＃「強調」はゴシック体］。
